moves.name: Stand LP
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Fastest jab check in the game with barely any recovery frames makes this the safest meaty jab oki there is

moves.name: Stand MP
moves.notes: Good combo and frametrap tool that can also go into two different target combos

moves.name: Stand HP
moves.notes: Forces stand on active frames 1-2 (vital for his Jackknife Maximum combo routes) | Strong combo / whiff punish tool with great range and lots of active frames (can easily convert into combos if spaced properly)

moves.name: Stand LK
moves.notes: DJs only light button that combos into HK Sobat on hit and into OD Sobat in Punish situations, making this a good buffer tool | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MK
moves.notes: Combo starter as well as a decent poke tool

moves.name: Stand HK
moves.notes: Good range poke and whiff punish tool that leads to Drive Rush combos on Punish Counter | Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state on Punish Counter

moves.name: Crouch LP
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MP
moves.notes: Core buffer / combo tool and also applicable in a lot of oki / meaty situations | Has very good hitbox priority against low attacks

moves.name: Crouch HP
moves.notes: Combo tool and a decent counterpoke with good hitbox priority | Forces stand (vital for his Jackknife Maximum combo routes)

moves.name: Crouch LK
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MK
moves.notes: Unorthodox sweep that only causes Hard Knockdown on Punish Counter | Good hitbox priority for a low attack

moves.name: Crouch HK
moves.notes: Upper body and legs are invincible to airborne strikes on frames 12-23 | Solid anti-air (but slow start-up)

moves.name: Jump LP
moves.notes: Can be used as an instant Overhead

moves.name: Jump MP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state | Very lenient cancel window (25F) for the follow-up HP air target combo

moves.name: Jump HP
moves.notes: Spikes down airborne opponents on hit

moves.name: Jump LK
moves.notes: Situational air-to-air

moves.name: Jump MK
moves.notes: Cross-up

moves.name: Jump HK
moves.notes: Decent jump-in that hits in front of Dee Jay before swinging his leg downward

moves.name: Knee Shot
moves.notes: Alters DJ's trajectory causing him to fall slightly faster towards the ground, allowing DJ to manipulate his jump arcs and his pressure or setup options from a jump (up to 5F shorter airborne frames overall compared to a regular jump) | Only possible during a forward jump

moves.name: Party in the Air
moves.notes: First hit (MP) puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state and the second hit (HP) spikes down airborne opponents on hit

moves.name: Sunrise Heel
moves.notes: Not an Overhead (despite looking like one) | Plus on block normal with good range that combos naturally even from further away (even better combos when spaced out slightly)

moves.name: Face Breaker
moves.notes: Head hurtbox is invincible to airborne strikes on frames 4-12 | Forces stand (vital for his Jackknife Maximum combo routes)

moves.name: Threebeat Combo 1
moves.notes: Solid poking tool from jab that's easily hit confirmed into the third hit for the extra damage and +3 strike / throw mixup | Second hit (MK) can whiff on crouching from further away resulting in much worse frame advantage (-17 oH / -22 oB) listed in the parentheses

moves.name: Threebeat Combo 2
moves.notes: Good target combo to convert into damage and pressure from DJ's stand LP | Leaves DJ with +3 on hit and in range for a strike / throw mixup

moves.name: Funky Dance 1
moves.notes: The second hit can be delayed quite a bit which creates a frametrap on block for the opponent (cancel window is on frames 9-15 of MP) | 2F extra recovery on BLOCK only

moves.name: Funky Dance 2
moves.notes: Last hit (HP) only combos if the second MP counter-hits (which can happen when the prior hits are delayed to create a frametrap scenario) | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: Funky Dance Feint
moves.notes: A feint option to keep the opponent guessing on if they want to try to challenge DJ's MP Target Combo | Counter-Hit state for the entire feint duration

moves.name: Dee Jay Special 1
moves.notes: Can be spaced so the HP hits in later active frames for + frames on hit/block | Second hit (HP) can whiff on crouching from further away resulting in much worse frame advantage (-22 oH / -27 oB)

moves.name: Dee Jay Special 2
moves.notes: Super cancelable | Puts opponent into a limited juggle state

moves.name: Speedy Maracas
moves.notes: Hold one punch button to continue dancing longer | Gains 1/5th of a bar of Super meter on frame 88 (frame 68 if starting with 2+ bars)

moves.name: Diss Track
moves.notes: Throw Loop: Dash up > whiff 5LP for +3 mixup between strike / throw (not possible on mid-screen back roll) | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Flip Throw
moves.notes: Back Throw oki when cornered: Can Drive Rush in for a strike/throw mix | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Drive Impact: Wild Beat
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frames 1-27 | Damages opponents Drive Gauge on Block (1/2 bar) | Hit (1 bar) | Counter-Hit (1.25 bar) | Punish Counter (1.5 bar)

moves.name: Drive Reversal: Leg Scratch
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-22 (frames 1-20 when used on wake-up as a Reversal) | Armor Break (blows through all armor like Drive Impact)

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: Parries all strikes and projectiles (high and low) from frame 1 | 12F parry window (can hold the parry to extend the parry window)

moves.name: Drive Rush
moves.notes: Dashes forward and enhances the next normal used out of the Drive Rush with +4 extra hitstun / blockstun (some moves also get unique properties enhanced such as juggle state) | The +4 bonus frame advantage gained from a Drive Rush enhanced move also stacks with any bonus frame advantage that move may have gained from Counter-Hit or Punish Counter

moves.name: LP Air Slasher
moves.notes: Takes 45 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge) | Can be useful to bait the opponent and also useful to extend blockstrings / combos and keep the opponent guessing

moves.name: MP Air Slasher
moves.notes: 1-hit projectile | Projectile Speed: 0.03 (1-2F) -> 0.115 (3F~)

moves.name: HP Air Slasher
moves.notes: Two separate 1-hit projectiles | Projectile Speed: 0.03 (1-2F) -> 0.115 (1st) / 0.155 (2nd) on 3F and onward (Second projectile travels slightly faster than the first

moves.name: OD Air Slasher
moves.notes: Two separate 1-hit projectiles (combines into a 2-hit projectiles if the first projectiles doesn't connect up close) | Projectile Speed: 0.15 (starts moving forward on frame 22)

moves.name: LK Jackknife Maximum
moves.notes: Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 12F after leaving charge) | Airborne on frame 6 until landing

moves.name: MK Jackknife Maximum
moves.notes: Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 12F after leaving charge) | Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-5 (can trade with a jump-in during active frames)

moves.name: HK Jackknife Maximum
moves.notes: Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 12F after leaving charge) | Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-9

moves.name: OD Jackknife Maximum
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-11 | Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 12F after leaving charge)

moves.name: LK Double Rolling Sobat
moves.notes: Just so happens to be a great framekill and setup tool for a bunch of DJ's setups and knockdown situations, making this not just a feint tool but also a part of DJ's mixup game and kit as a whole

moves.name: MK Double Rolling Sobat
moves.notes: Fast start-up and solid range makes this a good combo and poke tool in neutral (can be spaced to be safe on block)

moves.name: HK Double Rolling Sobat
moves.notes: Keeps DJ close on hit for +2 mixup pressure | Decent start-up and far range makes this a good combo / whiff punish tool in neutral

moves.name: OD Double Rolling Sobat
moves.notes: Low crushes on frames 14-28 | Not actually airborne despite what it looks like

moves.name: LP Machine Gun Upper
moves.notes: Mostly a combo / juggle tool | Only version that combos naturally from DJ's crouch MP

moves.name: MP Machine Gun Upper
moves.notes: Mostly a combo / juggle tool | Can combo naturally into this from stand HP

moves.name: HP Machine Gun Upper
moves.notes: Mostly a combo / juggle tool | Only comboable into during Punish scenarios or after utilizing Drive Rush

moves.name: OD Machine Gun Upper
moves.notes: Mostly a combo / juggle tool | Only comboable into during Punish scenarios or after utilizing Drive Rush

moves.name: Jus Cool
moves.notes: Follow-ups possible on frames 13-25 | Follow-ups can be delayed quite a bit which gives DJ the time to react to the opponents actions as well as mix-up his own timings

moves.name: Jus Cool > Funky Slicer
moves.notes: Low attack | Great whiff punish tool after baiting the opponent

moves.name: Jus Cool > Waning Moon
moves.notes: Overhead | Low crushes on start-up frames 12-22 of the Overhead follow-up

moves.name: Jus Cool > Maximum Strike
moves.notes: Upper body invincible on start-up frames 6-14 and again on frames 20-44 (entire recovery frames) of the follow-up kick | Upper body and the extended kicking leg are invincible to airborne strikes on frames 15-19 (during active frames)

moves.name: Jus Cool > Juggling Dash
moves.notes: Projectile invincible on frames 1-20 of the follow-up crouch dash (frames 14-33 overall) | DJ dashes forward to quickly close the gap, ducking under any projectiles or high hitting attacks

moves.name: Jus Cool > Juggling Dash > Juggling Sway
moves.notes: DJ hops back again to bait the opponent (no projectile invincibility or crouch sized hurtboxes like the prior forward dash) | Only 1F faster and slightly further distance covered than if DJ had just backdashed instead after the prior forwards dash

moves.name: OD Jus Cool
moves.notes: Launches the opponent into a limited juggle state | Follow-ups possible on frames 13-25 of the follow-up sway after the initial punch (frames 25-37 overall)

moves.name: OD Jus Cool > Funky Slicer
moves.notes: Low attack | Great whiff punish tool after baiting the opponent

moves.name: OD Jus Cool > Waning Moon
moves.notes: Overhead | Low crushes on start-up frames 12-22 of the Overhead follow-up

moves.name: OD Jus Cool > Maximum Strike
moves.notes: Upper body invincible on frames 6-36 | Has shorter range against crouching opponents

moves.name: OD Jus Cool > Juggling Dash
moves.notes: Projectile invincible on frames 1-17 of the follow-up crouch dash (frames 20-36 overall) | DJ dashes forward to quickly close the gap, ducking under any projectiles or high hitting attacks

moves.name: OD Jus Cool > Juggling Dash > Juggling Sway
moves.notes: DJ hops back again to bait the opponent (no projectile invincibility or crouch sized hurtboxes like the prior forward dash) | Only 1F faster and slightly further distance covered than if DJ had just backdashed instead after the prior forwards dash

moves.name: The Greatest Sobat
moves.notes: No invincibility whatsoever | Armor Break

moves.name: Lowkey Sunrise Festival
moves.input: 236236LP > LP > MP > HP > LK > MK > HK (bad)
moves.inputAlt: qcf,qcf+LP > LP > MP > HP > LK > MK > HK (bad)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-16 (follow-ups are also projectile invincible) | Armor Break

moves.name: Marvelous Sunrise Festival
moves.input: 236236MP > LP > MP > HP > LK > MK > HK (good)
moves.inputAlt: qcf,qcf+MP > LP > MP > HP > LK > MK > HK (good)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-16 (follow-ups are also projectile invincible) | Armor Break

moves.name: Headliner Sunrise Festival
moves.input: 236236HP > LP > MP > HP > LK > MK > HK (great)
moves.inputAlt: qcf,qcf+HP > LP > MP > HP > LK > MK > HK (great)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-16 (follow-ups are also projectile invincible) | Armor Break

moves.name: Climactic Strike
moves.notes: Switches sides with the opponent and has less knockdown advantage than the HK finisher | 6F less KDA (HKD +18) against airborne opponents

moves.name: Encore Beat
moves.notes: Has increased knockdown advantage over the HP finisher | 3F more KDA (HKD +37) against airborne opponents

moves.name: Weekend Pleasure
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-13 | Armor Break

moves.name: Weekend Pleasure (Critical Art)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-13 | Armor Break
